english: O Dhanada, giver of wealth, O Goddess who grants all desires
roman: Dhanada dhanade Devi sarva kama pradayini

hindi: धन धान्यं प्रदेहि मे वित्तं च प्रदेहि मे॥
english: Grant me wealth and grain, grant me riches too
roman: Dhana dhanyam pradehi me vittam cha pradehi me

english: O golden-wombed, fawn-eyed Lakshmi, born from the milk ocean, beloved of Madhusudana
roman: Hiranya garbhe harini akshi Lakshmi Kshirodajaate Madhu sudana priye

hindi: धनेश्वरि धन्यकरे धनाढ्ये सर्वेश्वरि मे धनमाशु देहि॥
english: O mistress of wealth, maker of prosperity, rich in wealth, O mistress of all — quickly grant me wealth
roman: Dhaneshvari dhanya kare dhanadhye Sarveshvari me dhana mashu dehi

english: A stream of gold, a garland of gems and rubies, seated on lotus, holding lotus, O queen of gods
roman: Suvarna dharam mani ratna malam padmasane padma kare Sureshi

hindi: श्रीधरपत्नि मम शीघ्रमागच्छ, सम्पद्विभूषे वरदे नमस्ते॥
english: O consort of Shridhara, come to me quickly, adorned with prosperity, boon-giver — salutations
roman: Shridhara patni mama shighram agachha sampat vibhushe varade namaste

english: This Dhanada Lakshmi Stotram — whoever reads it with devotion
roman: Dhanada Lakshmi stotram idam yah pathed bhakti man narah

hindi: धनं धान्यं सुखं पुत्रं लभते नात्र संशयः॥
english: Attains wealth, grain, happiness and children — there is no doubt
roman: Dhanam dhanyam sukham putram labhate natra samshayah
